info.name: Gold Price API
info.description: API endpoints for fetching live gold prices (XAU/USD)

request.description:
Get live gold price (XAU/USD) without caching.

Returns:
- price: Current gold price
- currency: USD
- lastUpdate: Timestamp of last update
- description: Information about gold (from database)
- coverImage: Gold trading image URL (from database)

response.name: Success Response
API Unavailable

request.description:
Get live gold price with caching for better performance.

Cache Duration: 30 seconds

Returns:
- price: Current gold price
- currency: USD
- lastUpdate: Timestamp of last update
- description: Information about gold
- coverImage: Gold trading image URL
- cached: Whether data is from cache
- cacheAge: Age of cache in seconds (if cached)

response.name: Success Response (Fresh)
Success Response (Cached)
Stale Cache (API Error)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "price": "2034.56",
    "currency": "USD",
    "lastUpdate": "2026-02-11T10:30:00.000Z",
    "description": "Gold is one of the most traded precious metals in the world. It is widely used as a safe haven asset and its price changes based on global markets and demand.",
    "coverImage": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610375461246-83df859d849d?w=800&q=80"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-02-11T10:30:15.123Z",
  "cached": true,
  "stale": true,
  "warning": "Returning cached data due to API error"
}

request.description:
Get gold configuration (description & coverImage).

Public endpoint - no authentication required.

response.name: Success Response

request.description:
Create/Reset gold configuration.

Admin only - requires authentication.

Body:
- description (required): Gold description text
- coverImage (required): Gold cover image URL

response.name: Success Response

request.description:
Update gold configuration.

Admin only - requires authentication.

Body (at least one required):
- description (optional): New gold description
- coverImage (optional): New cover image URL
